title: Huehuetlatolli: The Ancient Words of the Elders
description: Aztec moral philosophy passed from parent to child: how to live with honor, humility, and devotion to the gods.
introduction: Aztec moral philosophy passed from parent to child: how to live with honor, humility, and devotion to the gods.

translation.original_text: Nopiltzin, tlazopiltzin, ximocaqui. In tiquimitta in ticpia in timacehualtin.
translation.text: My child, my precious child, listen. We who are commoners must observe this.
